name: Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Diced leftover meat or bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried beans overnight.
2. Cook the soaked beans in boiling salted water until tender.
3. Drain the cooked beans.
4. Add sliced carrots, onions, tomatoes, and diced meat or bacon to the beans.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Grease a casserole dish and transfer the mixture into it.
7. Dot the top with butter.
8. Bake in a moderate oven until the vegetables are tender.
9. Serve with a green salad. Makes a very economical supper dish.
